docs.title: Hi!
docs.text:
👋 Hi, I’m Ryan, a technical writer, knowledge manager, and AI enthusiast, and hiker, forager, baker, and sci-fi nerd. This portfolio is a living, breathing documentation sandbox where I explore tools, workflows, and whatever otherwise lights me up.

🚧 This site is currently under construction, so expect half-built scaffolding, scribbled notes in the margins, and lots of sparks. Oh, and definitely the odd "testing 123" placeholder or 12. Or just as likely, bacon ipsum.

docs.title: What you'll (soon) find here:
docs.text:
• ✍️ Docs-as-Code Demos — Using MkDocs and Git to create structured, version-controlled content (that's this! Right now! How cool is that!)
  • 🤖 AI-Assisted Writing Workflows — How I use tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and others in my writing process
  • 🔄 CI/CD for Docs — Notes and experiments around automating content checks and deployments
  • 🧰 Experiments & Explorations — Just me, messing around with ideas

💬 Questions? Curiosity? Find me on LinkedIn or e-mail me to say hi.

Stay tuned!
